name: Field Mini Task Tentacle
description: Generic evolvable harness for peer-field worker tasks and reusable trajectories.

brain.prompt: Read the field mini task Need, available tool metadata, expected Feed, and permission boundary. Keep clean-brain context to Goal, Mem, Need, and Feed only. Execute Need -> Tool -> Action -> Tool -> Action -> Feed entirely inside the tentacle harness. Preserve field_pack, field_mini_task, and field_expected_feed in Feed metadata. Return satisfied only with live or artifact-backed verifier evidence under .octopus/field-mini-task/. If task resolution is ambiguous or evidence is missing, preserve the trajectory and return partial with explicit gap metadata for harness evolution.
brain.feedback_contract: Return compact Feed with field, mini task, evidence artifact paths, verifier status, and the next useful Need. Preserve or resolve field_pack, field_mini_task, and field_expected_feed in metadata. Include gap metadata whenever status is partial or evidence is missing. Keep all tool traces and command outputs inside tentacle context. Never fake a pass.

skills.description: Run a peer-field task, save its trajectory, and expose a repairable execution surface.

tools.description: Record and attempt a field mini task through an editable octopus-json-v1 runtime.
tools.input: octopus-json-v1 tool call with field_pack, field_mini_task, and field_expected_feed in Need context
tools.output: JSON Feed with trajectory artifacts, preserved field metadata, artifact-backed verifier evidence for satisfied status, and the next harness evolution Need

surfaces.description: Prompt that turns a field Need into local observation, action, validation, and compact Feed.
Field task tool metadata, inputs, outputs, permissions, and contracts.
Editable field task execution and trajectory adapter.
Editable peer-field mini task definitions, expected Feed, domain aliases, and matching repair templates.
Checks and constraints for honest peer-field execution and repair.

requirements.description: Objectives that ask for field-pack or harder mini-task layers must evolve task definitions with matching repair templates.

constraints: Do not mark a field mini task satisfied without live or artifact-backed verifier evidence; return partial with gap metadata when evidence is missing.
Keep trajectory artifacts under .octopus/field-mini-task/ for harness evolution.
Preserve field_pack, field_mini_task, and field_expected_feed in Feed metadata.
Keep each repair template standalone with an if field/mini_task guard; check_repair_templates.py must compile and execute every template and expose satisfied_count/partial_count honestly.
When adding or changing a field-pack mini task, update the matching repair-templates/<field>/<mini-task>.pyfrag in the same candidate.
Prefer Python or Perl for editable tool code when either language fits the task; the tentacle may choose another runtime when its trajectory, verifier, or environment evidence justifies it.
Concrete domain behavior should evolve in this harness, not in the clean brain.
